search:React Native Testing Library with.content:
- **CLI Commands**: `npx @testing-library/react-native test`
- **Latest Version**: Check on [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@testing-library/react-native)
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `setupFilesAfterEnv`: For setting up Jest before tests run.
  - `testEnvironment`: Set to `'react-native'` for React Native environment.
  - `transformIgnorePatterns`: Exclude node_modules except those in your project.
